consistency.source_agreement: The feature details align with standard 5th Edition Monk class abilities.
consistency.internal_logic: The mechanics flow logically: Reaction to reduce damage, potential for zero damage, catching the projectile, and optionally spending Ki for a ranged attack with it. The specified range (20/60 ft) and proficiency grant are clear.
consistency.terminology: Uses standard D&D 5e terminology (reaction, ki point, proficiency, ranged weapon attack).

quality.clarity: The feature is very clearly written, detailing the trigger, effect, damage reduction formula (1d10 + DEX mod + level), and the optional Ki cost action.
quality.completeness: All mechanical components are present: trigger, cost (reaction), effect (damage reduction), conditional secondary effect (catching), and optional tertiary effect (Ki spend + ranged attack details).
quality.balance_consideration: This is a core class feature, generally considered well-balanced for its level and role, providing utility and defense against common ranged threats.

mechanics.trigger: Being hit by a ranged weapon attack.
mechanics.primary_effect: Damage reduction: 1d10 + Dexterity modifier + Monk Level.
mechanics.secondary_effect: Can catch the missile if small enough and one hand is free.
mechanics.tertiary_effect: Make a ranged attack with the caught missile as part of the same reaction. Attack uses proficiency, missile counts as a monk weapon (Range 20/60 ft).
